name: STM32U375 LQFP64 SMPS
description: Generated from the STM32U375 alternate-function workbook and STM32U375CE datasheet for STM32U375 LQFP64 SMPS. This definition models the LQFP64 SMPS package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32U375 devices pair an ultra-low-power Arm Cortex-M33 core with TrustZone, FPU, 1 Mbyte of flash memory, 256 Kbytes of SRAM, and SMPS support. This package definition exposes 40 peripheral blocks covering 7 timers, 4 low-power timers, 5 serial ports, 3 SPI controllers, 3 I2C controllers, 1 serial audio interface, 1 SDMMC host interface, 1 FDCAN controller, 2 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, 2 on-chip operational amplifiers, 2 ultra-low-power comparators, and 1 USB interface.
